methods.method_name: Rabbit Experimental Design and Treatment Administration
methods.description: This method describes the experimental design and administration of treatments to rabbits, including grouping, treatment types, and administration schedule.

steps.description: Rabbits were weighed to form four homogeneous groups and were entirely randomized for one of four treatments.
steps.searchable_summary: randomize rabbits into four treatment groups based on weight

steps.description: Treatments were administered five times per week (Monday through Friday) throughout the experimental period.
steps.searchable_summary: schedule treatment administration five times per week

steps.description: The BP500, PRO50, or BP + PRO treatments were first applied to 200 mL of drinking water in each of the cages using automatic drinkers.
steps.searchable_summary: apply treatments to drinking water in cages

steps.description: The BP500, PRO50, or BP + PRO treatments were adjusted each week based on the body weights obtained.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust treatment doses weekly based on body weight

methods.description: This method outlines the statistical procedures used to analyze the experimental data, including ANOVA, normality tests, and model fitting.

steps.description: All data were analyzed by analysis of variance (ANOVA) using SAS statistical software.
The normality of the data was evaluated with the Shapiro-Wilk test using the UNIVARIATE procedure.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate data normality with Shapiro-Wilk test

steps.description: The MIXED procedure was used, and each cage was considered the experimental unit.
steps.searchable_summary: use MIXED procedure for repeated measures analysis

steps.description: Different variance-covariance structures were tested to fit the statistical model, and the compound symmetry structure was chosen.
steps.searchable_summary: test and select variance-covariance structure for model

steps.description: Variables were analyzed using a completely randomized design with the GLM procedure of SAS.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze variables with GLM procedure in SAS

steps.description: Treatment means were compared using Tukey's test.
steps.searchable_summary: compare treatment means with Tukey's test

steps.description: The mortality rate was analyzed as a percentage using chi-square analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze mortality rate with chi-square test
